backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profile management and bill CRUD operations with access control, GST calculations (18% split into CGST/SGST), and per-user bill stores keyed by invoice number.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades OldBill records (without line items) to NewBill records by appending an empty lineItems array, mapping over all user bill stores.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two implemented features—the editable line item table in AddBillForm and the updated InvoicePrintView—to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to one-line descriptions, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key changes in each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Manish Infratech React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the Vite/TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for add-bill, search, summary, and invoice print pages, all wrapped in AuthGuard and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page screen shown to unauthorized principals displaying their principal ID, a denial message, and a logout button to try another account.
frontend/src/components/AddBillForm.tsx: Bill entry form with party name, invoice number, and a dynamic line item table (up to 10 rows) featuring Sr. No., HSN Code, Product Name, Amount, and auto-computed 18% GST per row, plus a live aggregated CGST/SGST/round-off/final-amount summary before saving.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Wraps app children with authentication and authorization checks, showing loading states, login screen, access denied screen, or profile setup modal based on the user's identity, role, and profile status.
frontend/src/components/BillResultsTable: Renders a paginated table of bills with invoice number, party name, tax breakdown, and a print link; shows loading skeleton or empty state when appropriate.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintView: Displays a formatted, print-ready tax invoice layout for a single bill, including header, invoice details, line items table, and GST summary.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky navbar (brand, nav links, user name, logout) and responsive mobile menu; bypasses layout on print pages.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Renders the login page with branding and an Internet Identity login button, showing a loading spinner while authentication is in progress.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen form that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and save their profile before accessing the app.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Displays a 2x2 grid of metric cards showing total revenue, total GST, CGST, and SGST with icons and formatted currency values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user roles, user profiles, bills, and aggregate financial totals.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Inter/Poppins fonts, defines a navy/saffron design token palette for light and dark modes, and adds print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddBillPage.tsx: Page component that renders a header and the AddBillForm for creating new invoices with GST calculation.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePrintPage.tsx: Page that fetches a bill by invoice number and displays a print-ready invoice view with print controls and error/loading states.
frontend/src/pages/SearchBillsPage.tsx: Page that fetches all bills and provides a live search input to filter results by party name or invoice number, displaying them in a table.
frontend/src/pages/SummaryPage.tsx: Page that displays aggregate financial totals (total revenue, CGST, SGST, total GST) using the useGetAggregate hook with loading skeletons and a refresh button.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as Indian Rupee currency using the Indian numbering system.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (navy, saffron, semantic tokens via oklch), fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radii, shadows, and accordion animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Manish Infratech billing/invoice web app at schema version 7, documenting existing features (authentication, bill creation with GST calculation, search, summary, PDF print, multi-line items), architectural notes, and a known authentication bug.
